parameters.query: SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = $1 LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()
INSERT INTO mute_list (discord_id, muted_by) VALUES ($1, $1) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

body.content: You've been muted. I will no longer send you proactive messages. Reply `!unmute` to re-enable.
You've been unmuted. I will resume sending you helpful messages.

parameters.query: SELECT key, value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key LIKE 'action_log_%'

nodes.name: Q&A Handler — Post Reply in DM

parameters.query: INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()

parameters.query: SELECT id, type, content_json, status, approver_discord_id, expires_at FROM drafts WHERE id = $1
UPDATE drafts SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending' RETURNING id, type, content_json

parameters.query: SELECT id, type, content_json, status, approver_discord_id, expires_at FROM drafts WHERE id = $1
UPDATE drafts SET status = 'rejected' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending'

body.content: =Time entry draft {{ $json.draft_id }} rejected. Nothing has been logged to Clockify.

nodes.name: Edit — Parse Draft ID and Description

parameters.query: SELECT id, type, content_json, status, approver_discord_id, expires_at FROM drafts WHERE id = $1

UPDATE drafts
SET content_json = jsonb_set(
      jsonb_set(content_json, '{text}', $2::jsonb),
      '{metadata,description}', $3::jsonb
    ),
    status = 'approved'
WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending'
RETURNING id, content_json

nodes.name: Edit — Update Draft Content and Mark Approved
